## Summary

-

## Privacy Boundary

- [ ] Uses synthetic data only
- [ ] Does not add real workbooks, identity maps, business records, or private notes
- [ ] Updates docs when the public/private boundary changes

## Improvement Loop

- [ ] Captures the reason for the change
- [ ] Evaluates whether an artifact should be promoted
- [ ] Adds or updates a template, rule, script, checklist, or test when useful

## Checks

- [ ] `ruff check .`
- [ ] `mypy src`
- [ ] `pytest`
- [ ] synthetic PII gate
